upcoming.name: Tech Pioneer Awards 2026
upcoming.desc: Recognising the boldest deep-tech builders in the IIT Madras ecosystem. Categories and nominations open soon.

upcoming.name: Nirmaan — next pre-incubation cohort
upcoming.desc: Pratham and Akshar intake for student teams — ₹2L to ₹7L in grants, workspace and mentorship.

past.name: Delta Expo 2026
past.desc: The institute's flagship innovation and startup expo — 45+ innovation teams and 30 startups across robotics, AI, biotech, aerospace, electronics, product design and sustainability. Inaugurated by the Hon'ble Governor of Tamil Nadu.

past.name: E-Summit 2026 — 'Vision to Venture'
past.desc: E-Cell IIT Madras's flagship summit: 10,000+ students and founders, 500+ startups, 100+ investors and mentors, pitch arenas and masterclasses. The ₹600 Cr IIT Madras Unicorn Frontier Fund I was announced at the inauguration.

past.name: IIT Madras Technology Summit 2026
past.desc: SIE showcased its deep-tech venture pipeline at the inaugural IITM Technology Summit, inaugurated by the Hon'ble Minister of Education.

past.name: Research Conclave 2025
past.desc: A full day of learning, collaboration and knowledge exchange for students, researchers and innovators, hosted at CFI.

past.name: CFI Open House 2025
past.desc: CFI's flagship annual showcase — every club and competition team demos a year of building to the campus and public.
